tasks.label: Assemble and Link NES
args: if (!(Test-Path Build)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory Build | Out-Null }; ca65 src/main.s -g -o Build/main.o
tasks.detail: Assembles an NES project using cc65, creating the Build folder if needed.

tasks.label: Build NES
args: if (!(Test-Path Build)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory Build | Out-Null }; ld65 -t nes -o Build/HRS.nes Build/main.o --dbgfile Build/HRS.dbg
tasks.detail: Links the NES object file to create a ROM, ensuring the Build folder exists.

tasks.label: Clean NES Build
tasks.detail: Removes the Build directory and all generated files.
